commits: d7bbea6: test(0.5.2-COMPAT): design memo for cross-cutting capability-compat suite
da70a3c: test(0.5.2-COMPAT): lock cross-cutting capability/naming contract vs real config

tdd_evidence.note: Regression-lock pack against already-shipped code: the suite is GREEN on first write, so there is no separate RED tests-only commit. Each load-bearing assertion was proven able to go RED by temporarily inverting the expected value and confirming failure, then restoring (no product change). Inversion evidence: (1) collision-safety resolve('gemini-3.1-pro-preview') real=None, inverted assert =="x" FAILS; (2) old<->new parity infer_provider('vertex/gemini-3.5-flash') real='vertex_ai', inverted assert =='gemini' FAILS; (3) capability<->wiring forcing every entry to expect batch yields 63 mismatches over 73 entries (assert FAILS), confirming endpoints_for matches the rule exactly (0 mismatches when correct).

blockers_encountered.description: First run: 4 TestAliasParity cases failed with infer_provider(...) == None for anthropic/, vertex/, vllm/, and aistudio-prefixed aliases. Root cause: the autouse conftest fixture tests/conftest.py::_reset_router_catalog calls set_router_config(None) before every test function, emptying router._alias_provider_map AFTER my originally module-scoped 'wired' fixture had populated it. infer_provider then fell back to the prefix-only heuristic (_PROVIDER_PREFIXES), which covers mistral but not anthropic/vertex_ai/openai-via-vllm. This is a test-harness ordering interaction, NOT a product bug (alias_table.resolve assertions passed because the autouse reset only touches the router catalog, not the alias table).
blockers_encountered.resolution: Made the 'wired' fixture function-scoped so it re-applies set_router_config(cfg) AFTER the autouse reset runs for each test. Suite went 43/43 green; no product/config change.

additional_changes_made_in_scope: wired fixture scope changed from module to function (see DETECT-1) — test-internal only, keeps catalog-first infer_provider lookups order-independent against the autouse router-reset conftest fixture.
agent_verify_result: pass — uv run --extra test python -m pytest tests/test_0_5_2_capability_compat.py -q => 43 passed. Neighbor sanity run (test_model_alias, test_capability, test_models_seam, test_batch_gateway) => 248 passed, no interference. ruff check + ruff format --check clean.
next_step_for_orchestrator: Pack 0.5.2-COMPAT-tests on branch feat/0.5.2-COMPAT-tests at da70a3c; review, verify, merge. Tests-only, zero product/config changes.
